summary: Feature adds core/stretch tier labeling, input validation, stable rowMap via useMemo, and misconfigured status for enabled-but-incomplete integrations. Tests cover all new behaviors including VAL-INTEGRATIONS-001 and VAL-INTEGRATIONS-003.

strengths: Clean separation of deriveStatus logic with JSDoc explaining the validation rationale
useMemo stabilizes rowMap to prevent unnecessary re-renders and callback instability
Validation errors are shown both in-card (Misconfigured badge + helper text) and in-dialog (pre-save validation)
Good test coverage: tier badges, misconfigured states, blank api_key, composio consumer_key, and save-without-key validation

nonBlockingIssues.description: The validateConfig function only checks for api_key or consumer_key, but integrations with hasChainSelector could benefit from chain validation too. Currently a chain is optional, which is acceptable but could lead to incomplete configs for chain-specific integrations.
